title: Trusted Types
description: Architect strict DOM policies using Trusted Types to eliminate DOM-based XSS vulnerabilities. Enforce type-safety on dangerous 'Sink' functions like `innerHTML` and `eval'. Implement Trusted Types to enhance the security posture of web applications against client-side injection attacks.
objectives: Architect strict DOM policies using Trusted Types to eliminate DOM-based XSS vulnerabilities.
Enforce type-safety on dangerous 'Sink' functions like `innerHTML` and `eval'.
Implement Trusted Types to enhance the security posture of web applications against client-side injection attacks.
